valid_tests.comment: Minimum threshold subset of signers
Reordering the signer set leaves the partial signature unchanged, because the identifiers are sorted before they are bound into the binding value
A different threshold subset gives a different partial signature, since the Lagrange coefficients depend on the signer set
All signers participate, signed by a non-first member of the signer set
Aggregate nonce is the point at infinity, so the final nonce point falls back to the generator G
Empty message
Non-standard message length (38 bytes)

sign_error_tests.comment: Signer's identifier is absent from the signer set

error.message: The signer's id must be present in the participant identifier list.

sign_error_tests.comment: Signer set contains a duplicate id

error.message: The participant identifier list contains duplicate elements.

sign_error_tests.comment: Signer's public share is not in the public share list

error.message: The signer's pubshare must be included in the list of pubshares.

sign_error_tests.comment: A public share is not a valid point

error.message: Invalid pubshare at index 1.

sign_error_tests.comment: A signer id is outside the valid range [0, n-1]

error.message: The participant identifier at index 0 is out of range.

sign_error_tests.comment: Signer set's public shares do not match the threshold public key

error.message: The provided key material is incorrect.

sign_error_tests.comment: Aggregate nonce is invalid: first half has an unknown tag 0x04
Aggregate nonce is invalid: second half is not a point on the curve
Aggregate nonce is invalid: second half's x-coordinate exceeds the field size
Secret nonce's first half is out of range (all-zero nonce, which may indicate nonce reuse)

error.message: first secnonce value is out of range.

sign_error_tests.comment: Secret nonce's second half is out of range (zero)

error.message: second secnonce value is out of range.

sign_error_tests.comment: Fewer signers than the threshold t

error.message: The number of signers must be between t and n.

sign_error_tests.comment: Secret share is out of range (zero)

error.message: The signer's secret share value is out of range.

verify_fail_tests.comment: Negated partial signature fails the verification equation
A valid partial signature checked against the wrong signer fails the verification equation
Partial signature equals the group order, which is out of range

verify_error_tests.comment: Verification rejects an invalid public nonce, blaming the malicious signer
A public share is not a valid point

error.message: Invalid pubshare at index 0.
